hooks.command: $raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); try { $j=$raw|ConvertFrom-Json } catch { exit 0 }; if ($j.stop_hook_active) { exit 0 }; $ctx='If this turn changed project structure, routing, components, services, or system architecture, update CLAUDE.md to reflect it.'; Write-Output (@{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='Stop';additionalContext=$ctx}}|ConvertTo-Json -Compress)
